system.powerDescription:
You deform your own body and organs to perform an unspeakable violent act against a living being adjacent to you. When you use this power roll PSYCHE and answer the following questions, gaining +1D for each 'yes' answer, only spending a psyche burst on success.

• Do you let the hunger take over your thoughts and actions?

• Can you forgive and live on with what you're going to do?

Whatever question you answer 'yes' on, it affects the outcome of the action - no matter the roll.

If you target a human, instantly kill them and recover stress equal to the number of 'yes' answer, however take as much sin as stress recovered.
